message:
🐛 Fix OPA card not detecting Gatekeeper on late-reachable clusters (#1460)

Clusters like vllm-d and platform-eval may timeout during warmup but
become reachable minutes later. The OPA card only checked clusters
that were reachable at initial load time and never re-checked when
new clusters came online.

Add a useEffect that watches for newly reachable clusters and triggers
OPA checks for any that don't yet have a status entry.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
